title: Study apps making millions with this content format

slides.headline: Study apps found a content goldmine
slides.visual_note: Study app icon with download counter going up

slides.headline: The format: 'Study with me' TikToks
slides.body: 30-60 second videos. Timer on screen. Lo-fi music. Person studying (or just hands/desk). That's it.
slides.visual_note: TikTok UI mockup with study video

slides.headline: Why it works
slides.body: Body doubling effect. Viewers feel accountable. Creates 'we're in this together' mood. Insanely low production cost.
slides.visual_note: Two people studying side by side visual

slides.headline: The apps winning with this
slides.body: Forest: 500M+ views on TikTok. Notion: #studywithme hashtag. Quizlet: 1B+ video views. All using the same format.

slides.headline: Content variations that pop
slides.body: Pomodoro timer visible. ASMR desk sounds. Rainy window background. Cafe ambiance. Seasonal themes (finals week, back to school).
slides.visual_note: Grid of 4 different study video styles

slides.headline: The funnel
slides.body: TikTok video (free exposure). Link in bio to app. Free trial hooks them. Subscription converts. CAC: nearly $0.

slides.headline: How to replicate
slides.body: 1. Build a simple study timer app. 2. Create 30 TikToks in one afternoon. 3. Post 3x/day for a month. 4. Measure conversions.

slides.headline: Niches to target
slides.body: Medical students (huge). Law students. CPA exam prep. Language learners. High school AP students. Each has dedicated hashtags.

slides.headline: The numbers
slides.body: 1 viral video = 100k+ views. 1% click link in bio. 10% download app. 5% convert to paid. 1 viral video = $500+ MRR.

cta_slide.headline: Testing this with my focus app next week
